testcase.name: resetPassword_InvalidOtp_Returns400
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-06T15:59:33.741+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.smartcart.authservice.controller.AuthControllerTest]: AuthControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-06T15:59:33.777+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.smartcart.authservice.AuthServiceApplication for test class com.smartcart.authservice.controller.AuthControllerTest

2026-06-06T15:59:33.830+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.s.a.controller.AuthControllerTest : Starting AuthControllerTest using Java 24 with PID 400 (started by Raksha Gowda in C:\Users\dell\Desktop\Smart Cart\auth-service) 2026-06-06T15:59:33.830+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.s.a.controller.AuthControllerTest : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-06-06T15:59:34.370+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-06-06T15:59:34.370+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-06-06T15:59:34.371+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 1 ms 2026-06-06T15:59:34.381+05:30 INFO 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.s.a.controller.AuthControllerTest : Started AuthControllerTest in 0.601 seconds (process running for 50.428) 2026-06-06T15:59:34.481+05:30 WARN 400 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.s.a.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Runtime exception:
